overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring a futuristic vehicle driving through Night City's downtown district at night. The scene showcases neon-lit skyscrapers, holographic advertisements, and moderate traffic flowing through the multi-lane urban canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic downtown arterial road with illuminated barriers

events.description: futuristic vehicle accelerates from intersection following traffic flow

agents.ego_description: accelerating through the downtown intersection in a futuristic convertible with glowing red tail lights

notable_agents.action: silver sedan passing by rapidly on the left lane

entered.detail: tall futuristic glass tower with illuminated windows rising on the left side
massive dark glass building with neon accents on the right
collection of holographic advertisements and neon signs on building facades
yellow and black striped barrier with integrated lighting along the road edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a futuristic convertible driving through a neon-drenched urban canyon in Night City. Tall glass skyscrapers flank both sides of the multi-lane road, illuminated by vibrant holographic advertisements. The vehicle accelerates smoothly through the intersection, with other traffic visible passing by on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban canyon with prominent city signage

events.description: large green neon Night City sign becomes visible on the right building facade
vehicle maintains steady speed while approaching elevated highway structure ahead

agents.ego_description: cruising at steady speed through the downtown corridor passing prominent neon signage

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving ahead in the same lane maintaining distance

entered.detail: large green neon sign reading NIGHT CITY mounted on the building facade
overpass structure spanning across the road ahead with support columns
lower level of skyscraper with shop fronts and illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The vehicle continues through the dense urban environment, passing a prominent green neon 'Night City' sign mounted on the right building. The road leads toward an elevated highway structure ahead, with the surrounding glass skyscrapers creating a canyon-like effect. The camera maintains a steady follow position as the vehicle cruises through the neon-lit corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street approaching overpass with street-level commercial

events.description: vehicle begins to slow down and drift right while following traffic ahead
vehicle passes under the overpass structure temporarily changing lighting conditions

agents.ego_description: reducing speed and following a red vehicle ahead as the road curves slightly to the right

notable_agents.action: red sedan directly ahead slowing to a stop at the intersection

entered.detail: concrete and steel overpass spanning the roadway creating partial cover
ground floor commercial facades with illuminated signage and entryways
metal guardrail with reflective strips on the right side of the road

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, the vehicle slows down while approaching and passing under an overpass structure that creates partial cover over the road. The vehicle follows a red sedan ahead as the road curves slightly to the right. The surrounding environment shifts to show more street-level commercial facades while the towering neon signs and glass skyscrapers of the previous sections recede from view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-drenched urban canyon that gradually transitions into a more enclosed street-level commercial district. It begins with a futuristic convertible accelerating through a multi-lane intersection flanked by towering glass skyscrapers and vibrant holographic advertisements. As the vehicle cruises forward, the scene passes a prominent green neon Night City sign while the surrounding architecture maintains a dense, canyon-like effect. The camera then follows the car as it slows down and passes under a heavy overpass structure, trailing a red sedan along a slight rightward curve. Finally, the towering skyscrapers recede from view as the environment shifts toward street-level commercial facades.
